archetype.name: Blessed One
archetype.note: This archetype offers Ultimate Mercy at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Ultimate Mercy
feat.text: Your mercy transcends the bounds of life and death. Add ultimate mercy to the types of mercy you can provide. When you use Mercy, you can target a creature that died since your last turn to return it to life. The target returns to life with 1 Hit Point and becomes wounded 1. You can't return the target to life if it died from *disintegrate* or a death effect. The creature gains the other benefits of *lay on hands* after it returns to life.

traits.name: Champion
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the champion class.

sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
